title: Punjab and Haryana High Court acquits Gurmeet Ram Rahim Singh in journalist murder case
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court on Saturday acquitted Dera Sacha Sauda Chief Gurmeet Ram Rahim Singh in a murder case.A Division Bench of Chief Justice Sheel Nagu and Justice Vikram Aggarwal overturned the trial court judgment convicting the self-styled Godman.The High Court, however, upheld the conviction and life sentence of three others in the case.Ram Rahim will continue to remain in jail as he is serving sentences in other cases.A special CBI court at Panchkula had convicted Ram Rahi
